steps.title: Identify the antecedent
steps.content: The blank precedes “findings,” which needs a possessive determiner. The antecedent is “Watson and Crick” — plural.

steps.title: Apply the agreement rule
steps.content: A possessive determiner must agree in number with its antecedent. Since Watson and Crick are plural, “their” is the correct form. “They're” and “It's” are contractions (not possessive), and “Its” is singular possessive. That matches choice C — C is correct.
